---
title: "About the ASM-TMC Chapter"
description: "Learn about the American Society of Microbiology – Texas Medical Center Chapter, our leadership, and how to get involved."
---

## Who We Are

The **American Society of Microbiology – Texas Medical Center (ASM-TMC) Chapter** is a professional scientific organization serving microbiologists, infectious-disease researchers, and biomedical scientists across the Houston area and the Texas Medical Center.

We are a local chapter of the [American Society of Microbiology (ASM)](https://asm.org/), the oldest and largest single life-science membership organization in the world, with more than 30,000 members across 120 countries.

---

## Our Mission

> *To advance the microbiological sciences through the promotion of scientific knowledge and its application for the improvement of health and environmental well-being.*

The ASM-TMC Chapter fulfills this mission locally by:

- Organizing scientific **seminars, symposia, and journal clubs** at TMC institutions
- Hosting **networking and social events** to connect researchers at all career levels
- Offering **professional-development programming** (career panels, grant-writing workshops, science communication training)
- Providing **community outreach** to promote microbiology and STEM education in the Houston area

---

## Chapter Leadership

| Role | Name | Institution |
|---|---|---|
| **President** | *TBD* | — |
| **Vice President** | *TBD* | — |
| **Secretary** | *TBD* | — |
| **Treasurer** | *TBD* | — |
| **Events Coordinator** | *TBD* | — |
| **Communications Officer** | *TBD* | — |
| **Faculty Advisor** | *TBD* | — |

::: {.callout-note}
## Want to Join the Leadership Team?
We are always looking for motivated volunteers to help run the chapter. Contact us at the email below if you are interested in taking on a leadership role.
:::

---

## Member Institutions

The ASM-TMC Chapter draws members from institutions across the Texas Medical Center and greater Houston area, including:

- Baylor College of Medicine (BCM)
- The University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston (UTHealth Houston)
- The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center
- Houston Methodist Research Institute
- Rice University
- University of Houston
- Texas Southern University

---

## Affiliation with National ASM

As a chartered chapter of the ASM, we operate under national ASM guidelines and benefit from:

- Access to national ASM resources, grants, and award programs
- Representation at the **ASM Microbe** annual meeting
- Eligibility for chapter-level funding and support
- A direct connection to a global network of microbiologists

Learn more about ASM at [asm.org](https://asm.org/).

---

## Contact Us

Have questions about the chapter, upcoming events, or membership? We'd love to hear from you.

- 📧 **Email:** [asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com](mailto:asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com)
- 🐙 **GitHub:** [github.com/JacobKMcPherson/asm-tmc.github.io](https://github.com/JacobKMcPherson/asm-tmc.github.io)

To join the chapter mailing list and receive event announcements, send an email with the subject line **"Subscribe"** to the address above.
